final:
module alu_8bit(  
    input [7:0] obf_A,  
    input [7:0] B,  
    input [2:0] control,  
    output reg [7:0] result  
);  
    always @(*) begin  
        case (control)  
            3'b000: result = obf_A + B;         // Addition  
            3'b001: result = obf_A - B;         // Subtraction  
            3'b010: result = obf_A & B;         // AND  
            3'b011: result = obf_A | B;         // OR  
            3'b100: result = obf_A ^ B;         // XOR  
            3'b101: result = (obf_A < B) ? 8'b00000001 : 8'b00000000; // Comparison  
            3'b110: result = obf_A << 1;        // Shift Left  
            3'b111: result = obf_A >> 1;        // Shift Right  
            default: result = 8'b00000000;  // Default case  
        endcase  
    end  
endmodule
